title: FroggyCraft
description: A vanilla+ pack with lots of frog-related mods like Ribbits, tons of fun & useful mods like Create, and mods for those who love to build & decorate! Frogs, toads, & axolotls - this pack is an amphibian's paradise. 𓆏🐸𓆏
body:
This modpack provides a vanilla+ experience that adds new biomes, new and overhauled mobs, powerful tools, quality-of-life improvements, under-the-hood fixes, performance enhancements, and so much more. Oh and I almost forgot, the pack has a whole bunch of mods and other content related to **frogs**! I like frogs, and I hope you do too :] If you have an older or lower power PC that struggles with demanding mods like Create or you want nothing more than frogs and performance optimizations, you might prefer the [**FroggyCraft Lite**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/frogycraft) modpack – all the frog-related content from FroggyCraft with none of the extras! Join the [**FroggyCraft Discord**](https://discord.gg/WBQRfBgQEY) to report bugs, get help, and chat with other FroggyCrafters!
### **Frog-Related Stuff**

![Frog-Related Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7951b553aea5a3eca3dce5c27253048478109c1a_0.webp) - [**_Bucket of Frog_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucket-of-frog) (mod): lets you carry frogs in buckets just like axolotls and other aquatics. Warning: this mod is only compatible with the three vanilla variants of frogs, modded frogs from More Frogs 2 will revert to a vanilla variant if placed in a bucket. - [**_Frog Legs_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/froglegs) (mod): adds new block variants for froglights and froglight end rods. Also adds a bunch of new food drops, but that's not important, don't look into it. Remember, frogs are friends not food! - [**_Holdable Frogs_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/holdable-frogs) (mod): lets you pick up frogs and use than as tools – their tongues can grab stuff from far away and drag them towards you. - [**_More Frogs 2_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/morefrogs) (mod): this mod adds new frog variants that will spawn and can be breed only in certain places (the nether, the end, the deep dark, above y=250), they have their own drops, with one unique drop, the Light at the End block. - [**_Ribbits_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) (mod): adds villager-like mobs called Ribbits to the came, frog people with their own villages, trades, special items, and fun behaviors. - [**_SpaceFrog's Forever Young Tadpoles_**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spacefrogs-forever-young-tadpoles) (datapack): showing a tadpole a slime ball causes a quantum-superposition/magic allows the tadpole to clone itself into an ageless tadpole – keep your tadpole friends in their cute tadpole form forever! - [**_SpaceFrog's Hungry Hungry Frogs_**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spacefrogs-hungry-hungry-frogs) (datapack): frogs will eat hostile mobs. Adds a rare frog variant, The ÜberFrog, an immortal, insatiable frog that can one-shot kill any hostile mob, never taking any damage - makes for a great guard-frog for your base. - [**_SpaceFrog's Recolored Frogs_**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spacefrogs-recolored-frogs) (resource pack): replaces the skin of the warm variant frogs with something a bit less sickly and pale. So if those pale/whitish frogs ever weirded you out, worry not - they're now a beautiful shade of bright, froggy green. - [**_Villager Frog House_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-frog-house) (mod): now swamp villagers finally have a home, they get to live in a giant frog! Well, more of a frog-shaped communal building, still pretty cool. - **And tons more frog-related customizations and easter eggs implemented through special datapacks and [_KubeJS_](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) scripts.**

### **Fun & Immersive Game Expansions**

- [**_Better End_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) and [**_Better Nether_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) (mods): overhauls The End and The Nether adding new biomes, mobs, loot, and structures. The End has never looked better, and The Nether has never been more fun and challenging. - [**_Bosses of Mass Destruction_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) (mod): adds 4 new bosses to the game, each with unique and challenging battle mechanics and drop loot that can be combined to make incredibly powerful tools like anti-gravity devices and a staff that prevents hostile mobs from spawning in a 64-block radius. - [**_Create_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (mods): brings the industrial revolution to Minecraft! There's way too much to describe, check out the mod's [wiki](https://wiki.createmod.net/). Several addon mods are also included like [_Create Steam 'n' Rails_](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [_Create Copycats+_](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats), [_Create Slice & Dice_](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), and [_Create Enchantment Industry_](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric-legacy). - [**_Emotecraft_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) (mod): adds player emotes like in Bedrock edition and allows you to make your own custom emotes. - [**_Explorations_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorations) (mod): adds a variety of vanilla-style structures to the world like temples with great loot and other structures that make your world feel lived in. - [**_Immersive Paintings_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings) (mod): adds customizable paintings to your world; use any image and map paints of any size the vanilla paintings come in. - [**_More Axolotl Variants_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavm) (mod): adds more axolotl variants - the more variants of amphibians, the better! - [**_Mystic's Biomes_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystics-biomes) (mod): adds brand new biomes to world generation - Strawberry Fields, Lavender Meadow, Bamboo Blossom Forest, Autumnal Grove, Lush Oasis, Lagoon, and Tropics. - [**_Nyctophobia_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyctophobia) (mod): adds new spooky biomes to world generation - Haunted Forest, Haunted Lakes, Eroded Haunted Forest, Ancient Dead Coral Reef, and Deep Dark Forest. - **_YUNG's mods_**: [Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples), [Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons), [Better Jungle Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples), [Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts), [Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses), [Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments), [Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds), [Better Witch Huts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts), [Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges), [Cave Biomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-cave-biomes), and [YUNG's Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-extras).

### **Quality-of-Life Improvements**

- [**_Beacon Overhaul Reloaded_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beacon-overhaul-reloaded) (mod): upgrades beacons to have additional effect options including the unique effects nourishment and long reach. Beacon pyramids can be built taller and with more type of blocks to extend beacon effects over larger areas. - [**_Carry On_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) (mod): pick up most of the friendly mobs and transport them anywhere you like. Also lets you pick up chests and barrels and move them without needing to empty them. - [**_Custom Villager Trades_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-villager-trades) (mod): makes wandering traders useful! They'll sell you mini-blocks thanks to Vanilla Tweaks, but this mod also adds lots of useful and powerful, but rare, trades including an easy source for wind charges and some of the loot from Bosses of Mass Destruction. - [**_Inmis_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis) (mod): adds backpacks to the game, adding dozens of new player inventory slots in a banked configuration. - [**_Music Control_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-control) (mod): gives you full control of Minecraft music - reduce or eliminate delays between background music tracks and skip over tracks. - [**_Reinforced Shulker Boxes_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-shulker-boxes) (mod): adds new craftable shulker boxes that can store up to 108 stacks of items. - [**_Simple Voice Chat_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) (mod): does exactly what is says and adds voice chat to Minecraft. - [**_Smarter Farmers_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smarter-farmers-farmers-replant) (mod): farmers will replant the crops they farm, no more gardens turning into fields of wheat! - [**_Vanilla Tweaks_**](https://vanillatweaks.net) (datapacks): a selection of the available Vanilla Tweaks datapacks that adds new tools and game rules, makes quality of life improvements, and adds new recipes – name tags are now craftable! For more options, see: [vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks) - [**_Vertical Slabs Compat_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vertical-slabs-compat) (mod): adds vertical slabs to the game, enough said! - [**_Wraith Waystones_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) (mod): adds craftable waystones let you instantly teleport to other waystones in the world. It's like having “/tp” but implemented in a very survival vanilla way. - [**_Xaero's World Map_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) (mods): world map and mini map HUD that shows what areas you've explored in the world, set waypoints, and display players and mobs. - [**_You're in Grave Danger_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd) (mod): adds functional grave stones to the game. When a player dies, a grave stone is left in their place that contains their entire inventory – you never have to worry about your gear despawning before you can get back to it.

### **Visual Enhancments**

- [**_3D Skin Layers_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) (mod): changes the rendering of the top layer of player skins to be 3D and more consistent with the way mobs render in the game. - [**_Better Clouds_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) (mod): adds amazing looking, customizable clouds that still look Minecrafty. - [**_Bobby_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) (mod): cashes chunks that have rendered in you work and displays them without loading them, making you able to see far beyond your render distance and makes you world feel so much bigger with minimal performance penalties. - [**_Dramatic Skys_**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) (resource pack): makes the skies HD with realistic clouds and lighting. - [**_Fresh Animations_**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (resource pack): beings new life and expressiveness to vanilla mobs reminiscent to Element Animations' Minecraft shorts. - [**_Iris Shaders_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (mod): a popular shader pack loader, included are three preinstalled shader options: [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader), [Nostalgia Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader), and [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) - [**_Lamb Dynamic Lights_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) (mod): adds dynamic lighting and emissive lighting from items held by the player like Optifine. - [**_Vanilla Tweaks_**](https://vanillatweaks.net) (resource packs): a selection of the available Vanilla Tweaks resource packs that fix visual bugs in Minecraft and add other visual enhancements that conform to the vanilla aesthetic. For more options, see: [vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs)

### **Technical & Performance Improvements**

- [**_BetterF3_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) (mod): massively improves the F3 screen with customizable fields and color-coding. - [**_Chunky_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) (mod): allows you to pre-generate chunks over large definable areas in specific patterns (square, circular, oval, etc.) improving server performance and rendering. - [**_CreateBetterFps_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/createbetterfps) (mod): improves performance around Create mod components that typically trash frame rates like water wheels. - [**_Dynamic FPS_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) (mod): improves client system perfornace by reducing resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery. - [**_KubeJS_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) (mod): a powerful Javascript-based scripting mod that enables users and server admins to implement customizations that go far beyond the capabilities of datapacks. - [**_Ksyxis_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) (mod): speed up world loading and reduce resources utilization by removing the requirement to keep spawn chunks loaded at all times. - [**_Madgique's Tickrate Changer_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/madgique-tickrate-changer) (mod): lets you change the world tickrate to custom values similar to the 1.20.3+ command '/tick'. - [**_Memory Leak Fix_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) (mod): fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server and includes other performance improvements. - [**_MiniHUD_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) (mod): adds a 'mini F3' screen and various overlays like light level, spawn chunks, slime chunks, and custom shapes like de-spawn spheres. - [**_Roughly Enough Items (REI)_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) (mod): similar to JEI, view and search the full registry of blocks and items in the game, view recipes, item tags, etc. - [**_Sodium_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (mod): Makes massive improvements to performance and give you more control of your video settings. - [**_Tweakeroo_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) (mod): adds an enormous amount of new tools for power users including auto-clickers and freecam.

### **Mods for Builders**

Mods that add tons of custom blocks and items you can use to spruce up your builds: [**_Additional Additions_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd), [**_Adorn_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn), [**_Beautify Refabricated_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated), [**_Better Lily Pads_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-lily-pads), [**_BetterEnd Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-cutting-betterend), [**_Chipped_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [**_Decorative Blocks_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-blocks), [**_Ender's Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight), [**_Every Compat (Wood Good)_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat), [**_Expanded Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight), [**_Farmer's Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), [**_Hearth & Home_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-home), [**_Nethers Delight Refabricated_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated), [**_Paladin's Furniture Mod_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-furniture), [**_Re:Deco_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/redeco), [**_Rustic Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight), [**_Storage Delight_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/storage-delight), [**_Supplementaries_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), [**_Valhelsia Furniture_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/valhelsia-furniture)

### **Backports for Minecraft 1.20.1** - [**_Autocrafter Early_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autocrafter-early) (mod): adds the autocrafter, uses the original block texture - [**_Backport Paintings 1.21_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-paintings-1.21) (mod): adds the new set of paintings introduced in 1.21 - [**_Backported Spears_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-spears) (mod): adds spears and related enchantments - [**_Backpost Wolves_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-wolves) (mod): adds the new wolf variants from 1.20.5 - [**_Bundle Backport-ish_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-backportish) (mod): adds the bundle scrolling and dyeing mechanics from 1.21.2 - [**_Copper and Tuff Backport_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-and-tuff-backport) (mod): adds the copper and tuff blocks from 1.21 along with copper tools and armor - [**_Faithful Mace_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/faithful-mace) (mod): adds the mace, related enchantments, and the wind charge - [**_Happy Ghast_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/happy-ghast) (mod): adds the Happy Ghast, Ghastling, and Dried Ghast - [**_Pale Garden Backport_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pale-garden-backport) (mod): adds The Creaking, resin blocks, the Pale Gardens biome, and the rest of the Pale Garden update
### **Mob Overhauls & Additions**

[**_Companion_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/companion), [**_Creeper Overhaul_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul), [**_Critters and Companions_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions), [**_Earth2Java_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/earth2java), [**_Enderman Overhaul_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul), [**_Happy Ghast_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/happy-ghast), [**_More Axolotl Variants_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavm), [**_More Frogs 2_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/morefrogs), [**_Naturalist_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist), [**_Promenade_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade), [**_Ribbits_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits).

### **And so much more!**

There are so many more under the hood enhancements and fixes, quality of life improvements, and powerful tools like [**_Axiom_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) and [**_Litematica_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) – really, just too many to summarize.

Guide for Installation on Servers The following is a step-by-step guide on how to install FroggyCraft on a server hosted by Modrinth, but the general points should be applicable to other hosting services:

  1. Join the FroggyCraft Discord and download the PATCHED_MODS_FOR_SERVERS.zip file from the pinned comment in the "troubleshooting" chat. Unzip the files to your PC.
  2. Log into your account on the Modrinth website. Start a new server or reset an old server and select the installation type "Modpack base".
  3. In the modpack search bar, enter "FroggyCraft", select the modpack, and set the properties you want for the server (e.g., game mode, difficulty, etc.).
  4. Under the "Options" tab you'll see a button labeled "Platform" – click this button and select the option to "Unlink Modpack".
  5. Under the "Content" tab you'll find the mods and datapacks associated with FroggyCraft. Disable all of the mods with the yellow warning triangle indicating they're client-side only mods with the exception of the mod "Athena" – do not disable this mod. In case you're not installing the modpack on a Modrinth hosted server, a complete list of mods to disable is found in the PATCHED_MODS_FOR_SERVERS.zip file.
    Note: You'll see that some mods have updates ready, but do not update any mods or it will likely break compatibility between the various mods of FroggyCraft.
  6. There are three mods that need to be DELETED and replaced with patched versions – Bucket of Frog, Re:Deco, and Structurify. Make sure you delete these mods, don't just disable them, the original files need to be absent from the server before the patched files are uploaded.
  7. Click the "Upload files" button and upload the patched .jar files Bucket of Frog, Re:Deco, and Structurify found in the folder on your PC where you unzipped the PATCHED_MODS_FOR_SERVERS.zip file. The patched file names end in "FROGGYCRAFT_SERVER.jar" so as to avoid confusion with their unpatched versions.
    Note: Do not replace these mods with their patched version on your local client – FroggyCraft will run perfectly fine on your PC without any modifications and will be able to log into any server running the same version of FroggyCraft so long as the server's mods have been patched.
  8. You're all done setting up the server. Start the server and try logging into it from your PC. You might get an error when first logging in, but just try again, and it should work (this seems to be a sporadic issue related to Modrinth servers). For trouble shooting, join the Discord and ask for help in the troubleshooting chat.
Known Bugs
  • Items in the hotbar might be invisible upon first login; open your backpack once to resolve this.
  • Aquarium from Additional Fishing does not render vanilla fish/aquatics; they still exist and can be retrieved with a bucket but can’t be seen in the aquarium.
  • If you rename an ÜberFrog and place it in a bucket, it will lose its special ÜberFrog traits and become a normal frog. This only affects the ÜberFrog when placed in a bucket; otherwise, renaming an ÜberFrog will not remove its special traits.
  • The mods Bucket of Frog, Re:Deco, and Structurify have bugs that crash servers. To run FroggyCraft on a server, you'll need to use patched versions of these mods – links and instructions are found above in the "Guide for Installation on Modrinth Servers" section.
Future Plans Plans for FroggyCraft v1.2 or later:

  • Pick Your Poison (mod): adds tiny poison dart frogs to the world, and you can lick them and get cool effects! For legal purposes: do not lick poison dart frogs in game or IRL.
  • SpaceFrog's FrogCoin Currency (datapack): pay for villager trades with FrogCoin instead of lousy old emeralds. Your server economy can also run on FrogCoin - FrogCoin for everyone!
  • The modpack won't be updating to a version of Minecraft newer than 1.20.1 until the fabric version of Create Mod updates. Until then, I'll be adding mods that backport features of newer versions of Minecraft when possible.
  • If you have suggestions or features or changes to the next version of FroggyCraft, let me know by joining the FroggyCraft Discord (see the link at the top of the page).
Credits
  • Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
  • All resources that have titles beginning with "SpaceFrog" are written by me, SpaceFrog1984.
  • All other mods and resources are downloadable through Modrinth and have attributions listed on their Modrinth page.
